name: feature.campaign-intel.agents
description: Campaign Intelligence agent pack (ADR 0160 / ADR 0014) — the Campaign Intelligence Analyst, a manifest agent whose tools are feature.campaign-intel.nodes. It answers natural-language budget + forecast questions ('how should I allocate my budget across platforms?') over the performance store, from the one chat (ADR 0058). Tool-allowlisted to the intelligence nodes only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Campaign Intelligence Analyst
agents.description: Answers data-backed budget + performance questions over your campaign data — budget reallocation toward higher ROAS, creative-fatigue detection, outcome forecasts — via feature.campaign-intel.nodes. Recommends; the human decides.
